title: Inline small CFuncs to reduce function call overhead
body:
## Summary
- Add `--inline-cfuncs` option (default on) that inlines small CFunc calls directly into their callers
- Reduces function call overhead when `--output-split-cfuncs` places functions in separate compilation units that the C++ compiler cannot inline
- Safely skips inlining when `$c()` calls are present (to avoid scope issues)

Resolves #2367.

## Test plan
- [x] `t_extend_c_class` passes (tests `$c()` with module-specific `this` context)
- [x] `t_func_rand` passes (tests `$c()` with random tables)
- [x] `t_dist_docs_options` passes (documentation consistency)
- [x] Simple inlining test verified optimization works
